telephoto_85mm.prompt: shot with 85mm telephoto lens, shallow depth of field, f/1.4, beautiful bokeh, compressed perspective

wide_14mm.prompt: shot with 14mm ultra wide angle lens, dramatic perspective distortion, deep depth of field, epic scale

hitchcock_zoom.prompt: Hitchcock dolly zoom effect, vertigo effect, background expanding while subject stays same size, unsettling dramatic mood

crane_down.prompt: smooth crane down movement from bird's eye view descending to eye level, cinematic reveal shot

top_angle.prompt: extreme top-down overhead angle, bird's eye view, flat lay perspective, graphic composition

orbital_360.prompt: smooth 360 degree orbital camera movement around subject, dynamic parallax, cinematic lighting changes
